ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., in progress, completed, archived) */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the protocol used in the experiment */,
  "data_quality" REAL /* Quality score or status of the data */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the experiment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, archived) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the project */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sample */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the sample belongs to */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of the sample (e.g., tissue, cell line) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the sample was collected */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatments applied to the sample */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Experimental condition of the sample */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the sample */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the sample */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "differential_expression" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each differential expression result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the result belongs to */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the gene */,
  "logFC" REAL /* Log fold change (logFC) of the gene expression */,
  "logCPM" REAL /* Log counts per million (logCPM) of the gene expression */,
  "PValue" REAL /* P-value of the differential expression */,
  "FDR" REAL /* False discovery rate (FDR) of the differential expression */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis method used */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_differential_expression_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_differential_expression_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES analysis_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_differential_expression_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "gene_family" TEXT /* Gene family */,
  "biotype" TEXT /* Gene biotype (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  "function" TEXT /* Brief description of the gene's function */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the gene record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the gene record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* User's affiliation (e.g., institution, company) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the data */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the annotation */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the annotation is associated with */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the annotation is associated with */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was added */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., note, comment, review) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the annotation */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the method */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the method */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the method */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the method */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference or citation for the method */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the method record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the method record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)
